findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "agent_captcha_verify_domain" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Verify ownership of a domain before using CAPTCHA solving

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "landprice_watch_timeline" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

name: license_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a license registration (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: recall_watch_search
description: Search Japanese product / food recall notices (consumer-affairs-agency aggregator). Each hit includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: recall_watch_get
description: Get a recall detail plus full event timeline. Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: recall_watch_timeline
description: Time-ordered events only for a recall (the differentiator: when it appeared, when severity escalated, when it was completed). Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: recall_watch_recent_changes
description: Recent appearance / severity-escalated events across all recalls since the given ISO8601 timestamp. Each item includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: recall_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a recall record (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: pharma_watch_search
description: Search Japanese pharmaceutical approvals (PMDA) and NHI-listed drugs (MHLW yakka). Each hit includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: pharma_watch_get
description: Get a pharmaceutical record detail plus full event timeline. Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: pharma_watch_timeline
description: Time-ordered events only for a pharma record (the differentiator: when it was approved / NHI-listed / price-revised). Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: pharma_watch_recent_changes
description: Recent approval / NHI-listed / price-revised events across all pharmaceutical records since the given ISO8601 timestamp. Each item includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: pharma_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a pharma record (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: ordinance_watch_search
description: Search Japanese national laws / ordinances (e-Gov 法令検索 v2; Stage 1 covers the national level only — 自治体例規 ships in a follow-up). Each hit includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: ordinance_watch_get
description: Get an ordinance detail plus full event timeline. Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: ordinance_watch_timeline
description: Time-ordered events only for an ordinance (the differentiator: when it appeared / was amended / was repealed). Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: ordinance_watch_recent_changes
description: Recent appearance / amendment / repeal events across all ordinances since the given ISO8601 timestamp. Each item includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: ordinance_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of an ordinance record (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: tos_watch_search
description: Search Japanese / English-language SaaS Terms of Service snapshots (Stripe / Anthropic / AWS / Google Cloud / GitHub …). Stage 1 covers 'terms' docs. Each hit includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: tos_watch_get
description: Get a ToS snapshot detail plus full event timeline. Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: tos_watch_timeline
description: Time-ordered events only for a ToS document (the differentiator: when it appeared and each revision since). Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: tos_watch_recent_changes
description: Recent revised events across all SaaS ToS documents since the given ISO8601 timestamp. Each item includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: tos_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a ToS document (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: realestate_watch_search
description: Search Japanese real-estate transaction prices (MLIT reinfolib XIT001). Each hit is a single trade snapshot, ledgered for tamper-detection. Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: realestate_watch_get
description: Get a real-estate transaction record detail plus full event timeline. Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: realestate_watch_timeline
description: Time-ordered events only for a real-estate record (the differentiator: when it appeared / was revised). Includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: realestate_watch_recent_changes
description: Recent appearance / revised events across all real-estate records since the given ISO8601 timestamp. Each item includes firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: realestate_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a real-estate record (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: landprice_watch_search
description: Search Japanese 地価公示 (MLIT 国土数値情報 L01) standard-land snapshots. Each hit is one standard point for a given year, ledgered for tamper-detection. Returns ledgerVerified per hit.

name: landprice_watch_get
description: Get a 地価公示 standard-land record detail plus its full event timeline (price revisions, reissues, vanish events). Returns firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: landprice_watch_timeline
description: Timeline view of one standard-land point — all observation events with diff, observedAt and chain-hash entries. ledgerVerified is computed end-to-end against IDENTITY_SIGNING_SECRET.

name: landprice_watch_recent_changes
description: List landprice events observed after the given ISO8601 timestamp. Optional prefectureCode filter.

name: landprice_watch_verify_ledger
description: Verify the hash-chain integrity of a landprice record (tamper detection). Returns chainValid, brokenAt (if any), checked event count, firstSeenAt and ledgerVerified.

name: entity_search
description: Search a company/person name across ALL ledgers (sanctions, licenses, recalls, pharma, bids, subsidies, grants, public comments, ordinances, ToS, real-estate, land-price). Returns hits grouped per ledger, each with matchedField, a summary, detailUrl and ledgerVerified (hash-chain integrity). ledgerV

name: temporal_query
description: Reconstruct what a ledger item (or items matching a query) officially said AS OF a past date T, by replaying the kept event history. Returns each item's point-in-time state plus an F-037 provenance receipt (observed_at = the state's effective time). existence:false with a first_seen receipt when the

name: kyb_report
description: Turn a company/entity name into a structured English KYB / due-diligence report for foreign-inbound buyers. Aggregates cross-ledger hits (administrative sanctions, licenses, public bids, recalls, etc.) via entity_search, summarizes them (counts + deterministic risk_flags), and attaches an F-037 prov

name: alerts_create_watch
description: Create a saved watch: when a NEW matching event appears in a ledger, a notification is pushed to your destination. Filters: ledger (optional), keyword and/or entity (case-insensitive title substring). At least one filter is required. Backfill never fires.

name: alerts_list_watches
description: List the calling user's saved watches.

name: alerts_delete_watch
description: Deactivate a saved watch by id (soft delete; stops future notifications).

name: freshness_subscribe
description: Subscribe a machine/AI pipeline to ledger-change notifications: when a matching record changes, a signed "stale" event (with an F-037 receipt proving the change) is POSTed to your callback_url so your RAG/index can re-index. Filters: ledger (optional), entity and/or topic (case-insensitive title sub

name: freshness_list
description: List the calling user's freshness webhook subscriptions (the stored secret is never returned).

name: freshness_unsubscribe
description: Deactivate a freshness webhook subscription by id (soft delete; stops future deliveries).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: agent_tempmail_list, agent_tempmail_get, agent_proxy_fetch, agent_trust_score, pubcom_watch_search, pubcom_watch_get, entity_search · Private data: agent_audit_record, agent_trust_score, agent_trust_feedback, agent_identity_record, agent_identity_activities, sanction_watch_verify_ledger, recall_watch_verify_ledger, pharma_watch_get, pharma_watch_timeline, pharma_watch_recent_changes, pharma_watch_verify_ledger, ordinance_watch_verify_ledger, tos_watch_timeline, tos_watch_recent_changes, tos_watch_verify_ledger, realestate_watch_get, realestate_watch_timeline, realestate_watch_recent_changes, realestate_watch_verify_ledger, landprice_watch_get, landprice_watch_verify_ledger, entity_search, freshness_subscribe, freshness_list · Public sink: agent_tempmail_create, agent_trust_feedback, agent_webhook_create, agent_webhook_poll, agent_webhook_replay, agent_webhook_list_requests, freshness_list, freshness_unsubscribe · Destructive: agent_memory_delete, agent_audit_report, alerts_delete_watch, freshness_unsubscribe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: agent_tempmail_list, agent_tempmail_get, agent_proxy_fetch, agent_trust_score, pubcom_watch_search, pubcom_watch_get, entity_search · Private data: agent_audit_record, agent_trust_score, agent_trust_feedback, agent_identity_record, agent_identity_activities, sanction_watch_verify_ledger, recall_watch_verify_ledger, pharma_watch_get, pharma_watch_timeline, pharma_watch_recent_changes, pharma_watch_verify_ledger, ordinance_watch_verify_ledger, tos_watch_timeline, tos_watch_recent_changes, tos_watch_verify_ledger, realestate_watch_get, realestate_watch_timeline, realestate_watch_recent_changes, realestate_watch_verify_ledger, landprice_watch_get, landprice_watch_verify_ledger, entity_search, freshness_subscribe, freshness_list · Public sink: agent_tempmail_create, agent_trust_feedback, agent_webhook_create, agent_webhook_poll, agent_webhook_replay, agent_webhook_list_requests, freshness_list, freshness_unsubscribe · Destructive: agent_memory_delete, agent_audit_report, alerts_delete_watch, freshness_unsubscribe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
